title: A successful model request could erase a provider-list failure
observed: Independent provider and model inventory requests initially shared and cleared one error state.
expected_boundary: Each failed inventory surface remains visible until that surface succeeds or the dialog closes.
failure_mechanism: The model request cleared the provider request's error while the provider list remained unavailable.
impact: The provider selector could appear empty without an actionable explanation.

mitigation.minimal_repair: Keep provider and model inventory errors in separate state.
mitigation.behavior_test: Provider-list rejection remains visible while model loading succeeds.
